residual_data = [] for filepath in files_checkbox.value: data_obj = load_h5_solver_file(filepath) 
t, err1, err2, err3, err4 = compute_residuals_from_grid(data_obj)

residual_data.append(
    {
        "file": filepath,
        "t": t,
        "err1": err1,
        "err2": err2,
        "err3": err3,
        "err4": err4,
    }
)
residual_data
